items.title: UK House of Lords committee calls on Bank of England to reconsider proposed stablecoin restrictions
items.summary: The Bank of England proposed limits of 20,000 pounds per coin for individuals and 10 million pounds for businesses.

items.title: US Treasury Sanctions Iranian Crypto Exchanges Including Nobitex for Terrorist Financing
items.summary: The Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control accused the platforms of enabling illicit finance activities across Iran's crypto ecosystem.

items.title: Crypto PACs pour $3M into Maryland races as California voters head to polls
